types/BuiltinFunctionType.name: BuiltinFunctionType
types/BuiltinFunctionType.description: The type of built-in functions like len() or sys.exit(), and methods of built-in classes. (Here, the term “built-in” means “written in C”.)

info.excerpt: The type of built-in functions like len() or sys.exit(), and methods of built-in classes. (Here, the term “built-in” means “written in C”.)
